ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alchemy-fr/Zippy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alchemy-fr/Zippy
Language: php
PHP zip/tar/bz2 archives (de)compression library with commandline or extensions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alexjustesen/speedtest-tracker
Language: php
Speedtest Tracker is a self-hosted application that monitors the performance and uptime of your internet connection.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anmaped/openfang
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anmaped/openfang
Language: php
The openfang is a bootloader, kernel and toolchain for devices using Ingenic T10 and T20 SOC

ns0:entry.ns0:title: centreon/centreon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/centreon/centreon
Language: php
Centreon is a network, system and application monitoring tool. Centreon is the only AIOps Platform Providing Holistic Visibility to Complex IT Workflows from Cloud to Edge.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: commerceguys/addressing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/commerceguys/addressing
Language: php
A PHP addressing library, powered by CLDR and Google's address data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: drupal-composer/drupal-scaffold
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/drupal-composer/drupal-scaffold
Language: php
🚧 Composer Plugin for updating the Drupal scaffold files when using drupal/core

ns0:entry.ns0:title: googleapis/google-api-php-client
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/googleapis/google-api-php-client
Language: php
A PHP client library for accessing Google APIs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mautic/mautic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mautic/mautic
Language: php
Mautic: Open Source Marketing Automation Software.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server
Language: php
☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai-php/client
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai-php/client
Language: php
⚡️ OpenAI PHP is a supercharged community-maintained PHP API client that allows you to interact with OpenAI API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: opencart/opencart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/opencart/opencart
Language: php
A free shopping cart system. OpenCart is an open source PHP-based online e-commerce solution.

Language: php
Instant Upgrades and Automated Refactoring of any PHP 5.3+ code

ns0:entry.ns0:title: woocommerce/woocommerce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/woocommerce/woocommerce
Language: php
A customizable, open-source ecommerce platform built on WordPress. Build any commerce solution you can imagine.
